top_signals.title: Ocean rates weaker after tariff-driven peak season
top_signals.summary:
Fuel prices climb anew as U.S., Iran battle over Strait of Hormuz, but near-term outlook for tariff pressures uncertain ahead of midterm elections. 

The post Ocean rates weaker after tariff-driven peak season appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ether breaks the $1.9K resistance; is $2.1K the next target for ETH bulls?
top_signals.summary: Ether’s rally faces onchain headwinds, but rising staking demand and Google earnings could spark the push toward $2,100.

top_signals.title: Rising Crude, US Rate-Hike Bets Counter Dollar Inflow Support for Rupee
top_signals.summary: The Indian currency has fallen about 2% from its June high.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
